title: Enchantment Stacker
description: Allows Multiple incompatible enchants, Tweaking levels of enchants, allows /enchant higher levels, Less cost on Anvils and Grindstone Transfer enchantment.
body:
# Enchantment Stacker
A mod aimed towards Server-Only (singleplayer too) to stack Enchants to make "**God armor**" and tools/weapons. 
The mod adds the Ability to;

## Customize Enchantment Limit
You're able to **customize** the **Limit** on each **vanilla enchant** to how much can a player obtain by stacking together books

## Stacking Incompatabilities
You're able to Enable for Specific items which tools/weapons/gears can have "god" enchants or Crossing enchants, such as knockback II on axe (the enchants themselves cannot be blacklisted/whitelisted, it is a static config)

## Anvil Costs (Optional)
**[Enabled by Default]** Anvil costs are reduced and inspired by other mod creators. If you want to stack, it'll be hella expensive and be crossing the "Too Expensive" mark. It is customizable within the config.

## Grindstone Transfer (Optional)
**[Enabled by Default]** Grindstones can now **Transfer enchants** from one item;_(Weapons/tools/Armor)_ to a Book if inputed into the Grindstone (Does not give EXP if transfered, only the enchants that were on the item)

## Allow the Un-Enchantable (Optional)
**[Enabled by Default]** **Elytras, Shears, Shields, Brushes** can be now Enchanted through the Enchantment table!

It will not provide mending, rather the common enchants such as **Unbreaking, Efficiency**, _etc._

# MOD API's REQUIRED
- Cloth Config
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu

(Mod menu is Optional, but would be better to install)
